title: On the minimal generator number of a polycyclic nilpotent-by-finite group
publisher: Springer Science and Business Media LLC
abstract:
Abstract
                  
                    The determination of the minimal generator number
                    d
                    (
                    G
                    ) of a polycyclic group
                    G
                    is one of the few still open problems in the algorithmic theory of these groups. If
                    
                      
                        $$\hat{G}$$
                        
                          
                            G
                            ^
                          
                        
                      
                    
                    is the profinite completion of
                    G
                    , then it is known that
                    
                      
                        $$d(G) = d(\hat{G})$$
                        
                          
                            d
                            
                              (
                              G
                              )
                            
                            =
                            d
                            
                              (
                              
                                G
                                ^
                              
                              )
                            
                          
                        
                      
                    
                    or
                    
                      
                        $$d(G) = d(\hat{G}) +1$$
                        
                          
                            d
                            
                              (
                              G
                              )
                            
                            =
                            d
                            
                              (
                              
                                G
                                ^
                              
                              )
                            
                            +
                            1
                          
                        
                      
                    
                    holds. The aim here is to introduce a construction for
                    
                      
                        $$d(\hat{G})$$
                        
                          
                            d
                            (
                            
                              G
                              ^
                            
                            )
                          
                        
                      
                    
                    if
                    G
                    is polycyclic and nilpotent-by-finite.
